svg.title: TISL Orders system overview flowchart
svg.desc: Full orders system: entry points, three pipelines (standard, hamper, auction), payment, cancellation, inventory, and shared services.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What can customers do in the TISL portal?')
sendPrompt('What can admins do in the TISL admin panel?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through standard order creation in TISL')
sendPrompt('Walk me through hamper order creation in TISL')
sendPrompt('How does auction order creation work in TISL?')
sendPrompt('What happens when an admin confirms a standard order?')
sendPrompt('What is hamper-to-standard order conversion in TISL?')
sendPrompt('How does auction order confirmation work?')
sendPrompt('What payment methods does TISL support?')
g.text: M-Pesa STK · bank transfer · COD · credit card · credit account · store credit (LoyaltyService)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does TISL calculate order payment status?')
g.text: sum confirmed payments → unpaid / partially_paid / paid / overpayment

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the pending order status?')
sendPrompt('What is the confirmed order status?')
sendPrompt('What is the processing order status?')
sendPrompt('What is the ready_for_pickup status?')
sendPrompt('What is the shipped order status?')
sendPrompt('What is the delivered order status?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a customer rates a delivered order?')
sendPrompt('How does admin order editing work in TISL?')
sendPrompt('How does admin create an order for a customer?')
sendPrompt('How does bulk cancel work in TISL?')
sendPrompt('How does bulk restore work in TISL?')
sendPrompt('How does invoice generation work in TISL?')
sendPrompt('How does the trash system work for orders in TISL?')
sendPrompt('How does force delete work for orders?')
sendPrompt('What is the auction order admin workflow?')
sendPrompt('Who can cancel orders in TISL and under what conditions?')
sendPrompt('What happens on a simple no-refund order cancellation?')
sendPrompt('How does the refund-no-return scenario work in TISL?')
sendPrompt('How does the refund-plus-return scenario work in TISL?')
sendPrompt('How does TISL calculate refund amounts per item?')
sendPrompt('What financial reversals happen on order cancellation in TISL?')
g.text: reverse loyalty pts → refund store credit → reverse referral code → reverse promo code
→ refund credit account → create refund Payment record · void credit payments

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does order restoration work in TISL?')
g.text: re-deduct returned stock · cancel refund payment records · recharge store credit
restore referral/promo · status = confirmed_at? confirmed : pending · payment_status = unpaid

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the hamper financial snapshot contain?')
sendPrompt('How does hamper reverseFinancials() work?')
g.text: reverse promo stats · restore hamper stock

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does InventoryStockService work in TISL?')
sendPrompt('How does inventory qty work in TISL?')
sendPrompt('What is the order to inventory sync flow?')
g.text: product::decrement → product::refresh() → recordSale(referenceType: order | hamper_order | auction_order) → log InventoryLifecycleMovement

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does LoyaltyService work in TISL?')
sendPrompt('How does CustomerCreditService work in TISL?')
sendPrompt('How does the promo code service work in TISL?')
sendPrompt('What emails does TISL send for orders?')
g.text: order confirmed · shipped · delivered · cancelled · restored → customer + admin mailables
Blade templates per event · triggered at status transition

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are all the order types in TISL?')
g.text: standard · bulk · b2b · quotation · service · mixed · project · subscription

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What can customers do with their own orders in TISL?')
sendPrompt('What does OrderController handle in TISL?')
sendPrompt('What does AuctionOrderService handle?')
